_notes: Method-B LEAN: drop machinery noise + fix refresh cadence. Changes from method_hgpo_turnrd.json: K=4 (matches Method C), lambda_consistency=0 (no C3 consistency loss), lambda_value=0 + value_head=false (no V-head loss), lambda_entropy=0 (no negative-entropy reg), lambda_contrastive=0 (no contrastive aux), refresh_every_episodes=10 (fires 4× per 40-ep round; combined with the eager startup load in train_hgpo.py the standalone fitter ckpt is actually used). Goal: isolate whether TurnRD's α (with no aux losses + frequent refresh) can match Method C on sparse-reward WebShop. If still <C, the TurnRD apparatus is the bottleneck; if =C or >C, there's a viable path forward.
